film.title: Halaal Ki Kamai
film.overview: Halaal Ki Kamai is a 1988 Hindi-language Indian feature film directed by Swaroop Kumar, starring Govinda and Farha Naaz in lead roles.

dialogues.dialogue: Ok, take care. Well, at what rate are you selling water nowadays? Why are you making me ashamed Shankar bhai. Water and in milk? I swear by you.

I meant to say that your other foot may not become swollen. Now turn these beautiful legs of yours......this side, and let my eyes look at them There is a limit to shamelessness. I can not go out of my limit anyway. At least don't stop me inside my limit.

Is it so? You are threatening me in my area only. What should I do? I've a habit of killing my enemy in his own house. You are very proud of your manhood? Every man has it, but not to a dog like you. How dare you?
